title: Small office rent
note: Quarterly rent for a compact production office and meeting room.

title: Editing suite lease
note: Lease for an offline edit suite, calibrated monitor, and storage.

title: Core staff payroll
note: Quarterly payroll for the producer, coordinator, and production assistant.

title: Equipment maintenance
note: Inspection, repair, insurance excess, and replacement media.

title: Script development slate
note: Option fees, research, and writer sessions for three early-stage projects.

title: Festival campaign
note: Submissions, publicist support, screeners, and filmmaker travel.

title: Location scouting travel
note: Regional travel, local fixers, permits research, and scout photography.

title: Acting workshop
note: A rehearsal laboratory for emerging actors and directors.

title: Marketing retainer
note: Quarterly strategy, artwork coordination, press materials, and social planning.

title: Production debt payment
note: Scheduled repayment on a revolving production credit facility.

title: Legal and accounting
note: Contracts, rights checks, payroll reporting, and annual accounts.
